response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Microgrid is in cascading depletion deadlock; sharing would drop your reserves below the safe 0.50 SoC threshold, so you must preserve capacity and signal dr_aggregator for emergency grid support instead of peer-to-peer transfers.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r1c1'].
Your latest belief: Microgrid is in cascading depletion deadlock; all peers are below safe sharing thresholds and rejecting requests. r0c0 must preserve reserves below 0.50 SoC and only signal dr_aggregator for emergency grid support..
